name: Argentina
tactical_document:
## Roster
  #23 Emiliano Martínez (GK)
  #3 Nicolás Tagliafico (LB)
  #6 Lisandro Martínez (LCB)
  #13 Cristian Romero (RCB)
  #26 Nahuel Molina (RB)
  #20 Alexis Mac Allister (LM)
  #24 Enzo Fernández (LCM)
  #5 Leandro Paredes (RCM/regista)
  #7 Rodrigo De Paul (RM)
  #9 Julián Álvarez (ST)
  #10 Lionel Messi (CF/free role)

## decide() Decision PrioritiesConcrete rules the LLM should encode:
1. **If my `player_id` ends with `_10` (Messi, free role) and team_phase == "defending":** Hold or slow-walk toward the halfway line — do NOT track back. Conserve stamina; at 39, in his last World Cup match, every sprint is budgeted for the transition.
2. **If my `player_id` ends with `_10` (Messi) and I have the ball between the lines:** Prefer the killer Pass — ST `_9` (Álvarez) running in behind Spain's high line, or RB `_4` (Molina) overlapping right into the space Cucurella vacates. Shoot when within 22 units with a lane (shoot 19); do NOT hold the ball under Spain's 6-second counter-press — release and go again.
3. **If my `role == "GK"` (player_id `_0`, Emi Martínez):** Stay home — sweep only up to 20 units out of the box when a through-ball is certain to be reached first. Distribute short to `_2`/`_3` unless pressed, then long toward `_9`'s channel run over Spain's high press.
4. **If my `player_id` ends with `_7` (Paredes, regista) and team_phase == "attacking":** Drop between/behind the CBs to form the 3+1; recycle with safe forward passes and hit the early diagonal over the top for `_9` when Spain's line is high — one flighted ball beats sixty of theirs. Never carry into traffic — Spain's counter-press is the best in the tournament. If no forward option, pass square to a CB.
5. **If my `player_id` ends with `_4` (RB, Molina) and team_phase == "attacking" and the ball is central or left:** Advance high and wide right — the overlap is automatic because `_10` drifts inside, and Spain's left is their softer defensive flank. But if the team just lost the ball, sprint back immediately — Yamal counters into the fullback zones.
6. **If my `player_id` ends with `_8` (RM, De Paul) and the ball-carrier's `player_id` ends with `_10` (Messi):** Position 8-12 units behind and to the carrier's right — cover-shadow for the counter-press the moment `_10` loses it; Spain's transition through Olmo and Fabián starts on exactly those turnovers.
7. **If my `player_id` ends with `_6` (LCM, Enzo) and team_phase == "attacking":** If the ball is wide, make the late run into the box toward the far post (the Egypt winner); if Spain's block has re-set and I receive at the edge, Shoot from range (shoot 15 — the England equaliser). Otherwise offer the half-space link and hit split passes (pass 18).
8. **If my `player_id` ends with `_5` (LM, Mac Allister) and team_phase == "defending":** Tuck inside and double on Spain's right winger (`Spain _10`, Yamal) with `_1` (Tagliafico) — show him outside, never let the left-foot cut inside come free; when possession is won, release `_9` or find `_10` between the lines before Spain's block re-sets. On attacking corners from the right, attack the back post.
9. **If my `player_id` ends with `_9` (ST, Álvarez) and team_phase == "defending":** Stay high as the front two with `_10` and cover-shadow Spain's deepest midfielder (Rodri, `Spain _6`) — deny him clean receptions; do NOT drop into midfield. On transition, run in behind IMMEDIATELY — Spain's line is the highest Argentina have faced and the space behind it is the whole game plan.
10. **If my `role == "FWD"` or `role == "MID"` and Argentina just lost the ball in the opposition third:** Counter-press — Tackle the nearest opponent within 6 units for 5 seconds; deny the first pass out before Spain's circulation restarts. Exception: `_10` does not counter-press.
11. **If team is leading by 1+ goals and minute > 75:** Drop into the compact mid-block, protect the box, and break only with numbers-up — do NOT chase Spain's possession or press high; `_7` (Paredes) kills tempo on every restart, `_8`/`_5` hold the ball in the corners when it comes. Never foul near the box — Spain scored their semifinal opener from a drawn penalty.
12. **Penalties:** in-match penalty goes to `_7` (Paredes), NOT `_10` — Messi has missed two this tournament. Direct free kicks within 30 units remain `_10`'s (Messi).
